stdout:
usage: pcl [-h] [--root ROOT] [--json] [--version]
           {init,doctor,validate,migrate,render,update,goal,feature,story,test,task,defect,loop,workflow,jobs,prompt,agent,ingest-agent-run,evidence,context,receipt,index,code,impact,eval,verification,decision,escalation,checkpoint,next,finish,export,report} ...

Project Loop Harness CLI

positional arguments:
  {init,doctor,validate,migrate,render,update,goal,feature,story,test,task,defect,loop,workflow,jobs,prompt,agent,ingest-agent-run,evidence,context,receipt,index,code,impact,eval,verification,decision,escalation,checkpoint,next,finish,export,report}
    init                Initialize Project Loop Harness in a target project
    doctor              Check project-loop installation health
    validate            Validate project-loop state
    migrate             Apply or inspect database migrations
    render              Render dashboard from state
    update              Check for newer pcl releases
    goal                Manage goals
    feature             Manage features
    story               Manage user stories
    test                Manage test cases
    task                Manage tasks
    defect              Manage defects
    loop                Inspect or run loops
    workflow            Manage workflow proposals
    jobs                Inspect agent jobs
    prompt              Print generated prompts
    agent               Manage agents and generate adapter commands
    ingest-agent-run    Record an agent output file as evidence
    evidence            Record standalone evidence artifacts
    context             Build focused machine context packages
    receipt             Inspect code context receipts
    index               Build and inspect the code context index
    code                Search indexed code context
    impact              Explain likely code impact from a diff
    eval                Evaluate retrieval fixtures
    verification        Record verification results
    decision            Manage human decisions
    escalation          Manage human escalations
    checkpoint          Record and inspect integration checkpoints
    next                Suggest the next harness action
    finish              Plan terminal loop close-out steps
    export              Export state
    report              Generate evidence reports

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
  --root ROOT           Project root. Defaults to current directory.
  --json                Emit machine-readable JSON output.
  --version             show program's version number and exit
